metadata.title:
RACY TESTIMONY IN


BALDWIN SUIT

MRS TURNBULL TELLS OF CONTRACT MARRIAGE


WITH GREAT FINANCIER.

pages.raw_text:
LOS ANGELES, CAL. Dec. 15.-Mrs Lillian Ashley
urnbu mother of Beatrice Anita Turnbul today took
the stand the first witness in the brought by her
daughter for share in the estate of the late
E. j. lucky Baldwin, on the ground that she is his
daughter


II first met Mr.. Baldwin in Boston,, the putative
visited California. then that grew to know him
better. - -


AFTER living at the Hotel Westminster in Los Angeles
for some time went to San Francisco There Mr. Bald
win was very attentive.


1T in San Francisco that his attitude grew from
fathery one to something different. He asked to
marry hm and told that contract marriage in Cali
tornla was as binding ceremony performed by JUS
tice OF the peace minister Finally consented to
remember the wording of the contract Mr. Baldwin wrote
and signed his name to the following:


~ Elias jackson Baldwin, do take Lillian Alma Ash
ley to be my lawful and welded wife,


II wrote and signed the following:


- Lillian Alma Ashley, do take Elias jackson Bald
win to be my lawful and welded husband'''
